properties.text:

[8GB VRAM - Budget]
DreamShaperXL Turbo (~7GB)

[12GB VRAM - Recommended]
JuggernautXL v11 (~7GB) BEST

RealVisXL V5.0 (~7GB)

[24GB VRAM - Premium]

FLUX.1-dev fp16 (~23GB)

  (Gated - accept license first)

nodes.title: VAE, RMBG & LoRAs

properties.text:
=== ASPECT RATIOS ===
Set in EmptyLatentImage nodes:

1:1  = 1024 x 1024 (Square)
4:5  = 896  x 1120 (Instagram)
2:3  = 832  x 1248 (Portrait)
9:16 = 720  x 1280 (TikTok)
3:4  = 896  x 1152 (Portrait)
16:9 = 1280 x 720  (YouTube)
4:3  = 1152 x 896  (Landscape)

=== UPSCALE TARGETS ===
From 1024px base:
  2X = target_resolution 2048
  4X = target_resolution 4096
  8X = target_resolution 8192

Tip: Higher upscale = more VRAM.
Use 2X for 8GB, 4X for 12GB+.

nodes.title: Ratios & Upscale Targets

properties.text:
=== QUICK START ===

1. Select checkpoint model in
   Universal Model Loader

2. (Optional) Add LoRAs in
   the LoRA Stack

3. Upload FACE image (for swap)

4. Upload BODY image (person
   to dress)

5. Upload clothing images:
   Hat, Top, Pants, Shoes, etc.
   MUTE unused slots!
   (Right-click > Mute Node)

6. Edit Person Prompt and
   Background Prompt

7. Click Queue Prompt!

=== TOGGLE SYSTEM ===
Use the TOGGLE PANEL (top-left)
to enable/disable sections:
- Click group name to toggle
- Green = active, Gray = off
- Inpainting, Outpainting,
  Upscaling, Video start OFF
- Toggle ON only what you need

=== SAVE CHECKPOINTS ===
Each section saves its output.
Check output/ folder for results.

widgets_values:
=== QUICK START ===

1. Select checkpoint model in
   Universal Model Loader

2. (Optional) Add LoRAs in
   the LoRA Stack

3. Upload FACE image (for swap)

4. Upload BODY image (person
   to dress)

5. Upload clothing images:
   Hat, Top, Pants, Shoes, etc.
   MUTE unused slots!
   (Right-click > Mute Node)

6. Edit Person Prompt and
   Background Prompt

7. Click Queue Prompt!

=== TOGGLE SYSTEM ===
Use the TOGGLE PANEL (top-left)
to enable/disable sections:
- Click group name to toggle
- Green = active, Gray = off
- Inpainting, Outpainting,
  Upscaling, Video start OFF
- Toggle ON only what you need

=== SAVE CHECKPOINTS ===
Each section saves its output.
Check output/ folder for results.

properties.text:
Upload reference clothing photos. MUTE unused slots!
Right-click any node > Mute (or Ctrl+M on selected nodes).
Each item's style transfers via IPAdapter with body-region mask.
Chain order: Hat > Sunglasses > Top > Dress > ... > Shoes.

nodes.title: Composite Guide

properties.text:
INPAINTING: Fix specific
areas of the image.

1. Type what to detect:
   e.g. 'hand', 'face',
   'wrinkle', 'artifact'
2. Describe the fix in
   Inpainter prompt
3. Denoise: 0.5-0.8
   (lower = subtle fix,
    higher = more change)

BYPASSED by default.
Toggle ON in panel.

3. Denoise: 0.5-0.8
   (lower = subtle fix,

BYPASSED by default.
Toggle ON in panel.

image beyond borders.

to extend (64-256)

BYPASSED by default.
Toggle ON in panel.
